subcodes.first_line: ...O dear one of ‘Abdu’l‑Baha! Be the son of thy father and be the fruit of that tree. Be a son that hath been born of his soul
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای عزيز عبدالبهآء پسر آن پدر باش و ثمر آن شجر زاده عنصر جان و دل او باش
subcodes.subjects: @suffering; rejection of Christ, @non-participation in politics, @progressive revelation; renewal of religion, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
